name: linkshit
description: Linkshit — auto-scroll your LinkedIn feed and surface posts matching your criteria via a local LLM.

scripts.pack: web-ext build --source-dir . --artifacts-dir web-ext-artifacts --overwrite-dest --ignore-files README.md score-server.js package.json package-lock.json eslint.config.mjs LICENSE web-ext-artifacts/** node_modules/** .github/** .git/** .gitignore
